blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add evidence for fairness and policy engine validation
Verify that the same fairness and policy engine is applied to all staffing demand types.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that the same fairness and policy engine is used across all staffing demand types. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied, nor is there any API read or persisted state check that verifies the implementation of a unified fairness and policy engine. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the same fairness and policy engine is used by all staffing demand types.
